title: Vanilla Client’s Ice-Cream
description: An overhaul to the visuals of the game whilst keeping a vanilla taste.
body:
! I OWN NONE OF THESE MODS, ALL RIGHTS GO TO THE CREATORS!

Hi and welcome to the Vanilla Ice-Cream modpack! This aims to overhaul the visuals to the game whilst still keeping a vanilla feel. All mods included are CLIENT SIDED. This means that the modpack will work on any server that runs on vanilla or uses plugins / datapacks. I recommend for this modpack to add the "Vanilla Tweaks" resource-pack because it is fully customizable and will add the extra details that are missing from the game.

The modpack is already optimized so that you have the maximum entertainment with the many mods, including the physics mod. For optimization, it uses sodium, entity culling and LazyDFU just to name a few.

This modpack should be compatible with other mods if you want to add any. Just make sure that the mods are for fabric / quilt 1.20.4 as otherwise the game may crash.
